attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.MESSAGE_3B2_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.PO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.ASN_PROCESS_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.BOM_REF_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.ITEM_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.ITEM_REVISION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.ITEM_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.ORG_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.FLB_COST, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.DF_FEE_COST, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.PLANNING_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.COST_UPDATED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.CONFIS_TAX_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.ICMS_TAX_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.RND_TAX_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.PIS_TAX_AMOUNT 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY,
 (
 select PO_NUMBER ,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID ,BOM_REF_ID ,BOM_PARENT_REF_ID ,ITEM_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY
 minus
 select PO_NUMBER ,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID ,BOM_REF_ID ,BOM_PARENT_REF_ID ,ITEM_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PO_NUMBER = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.PO_NUMBER and ACM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID and ACM.BOM_REF_ID=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.BOM_REF_ID and coalesce(ACM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,-999)=coalesce(STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,-999) and ACM.ITEM_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.ITEM_NUMBER and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY.REFRESH_DATETIME
